name: accounting firms managing 10-20 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10-20 clients, missed compliance updates cause client penalties. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking of regulatory updates through newsletters and websites.
problem_solved: Keeping up with regulatory changes for multiple clients.
features: real-time alert system for regulatory changes
monthly summary reports of compliance status
